response.justification: While the candidate meets the minimum education and experience requirements (Bachelor's + 13 years), they lack the specialized hardware architecture and AI accelerator optimization expertise central to this role. Their entire career has been in web, backend, and infrastructure software development, with no demonstrated experience in SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture analysis, or deep-learning workload optimization—all core responsibilities.
strengths: Exceeds minimum qualification threshold (Bachelor's degree plus 13+ years of professional development experience)
Strong systems-level programming background in C/C++ and D language with demonstrated low-latency and performance optimization work
Proven track record optimizing complex systems for performance and efficiency across infrastructure and backend roles
concerns: No hardware design, SoC modeling, or IP design experience despite these being primary job responsibilities
Career entirely in software/backend/DevOps domains with no GPU architecture, hardware accelerator, or semiconductor industry background
Current 'AI infrastructure' work appears to be infrastructure for AI systems, not optimization of AI accelerator hardware performance

key_factors.factor: Missing hardware architecture and SoC/IP expertise
No GPU or AI accelerator domain knowledge
Systems programming and performance optimization background
